propos.information_1: Discover the authenticity of Vietnamese cuisine through our artisanal flavors

propos.information_5.3: This rest period allows our team to prepare to better serve you during the week.
propos.nouvelles_mauvaise: Due to unforeseen technical constraints, our dining room is temporarily closed.
propos.nouvelles_bonne: Good news! Our kitchen remains open and we continue to prepare your favorite dishes. Online orders are still available!
propos.application_information: Carried by a family from southern Vietnam, our restaurant is the result of the hard work of a passionate couple and a dedicated team. Together, we combine our expertise to elevate the authenticity of Vietnamese cuisine.
propos.carriere_info: No positions are available at the moment, but feel free to follow us for future opportunities.
